label: Donut chart
description: A pie with a hollow centre — the same share-of-whole read, with room for a centre total.

params.label: Legend
params.description: Show the series legend (auto for ≥2 series).

params.label: Height
params.description: Pixel height, or a percent string for responsive containers.

params.label: Palette
params.description: Ordered hex colours; series/slices take them in turn.
